description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a modern, open-plan design. The exterior is composed of multiple pastel-colored sections, including yellow, pink, and white, with large windows distributed across the facades. The structure is surrounded by rows of stylized, white-leaved trees, suggesting a landscaped yard or garden area. The front includes a covered entryway and a visible garage space, while the rear opens to a patio area with outdoor seating. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with a focus on horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, pastel-colored exterior sections, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a row of trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the patio area, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, outdoor seating, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entrance, additional windows, and the continuation of the landscaped trees.
